.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report.md---
name: Bug or Error Report
about: Report an error, incorrect content, or broken link in the toolkit
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What is the issue?

## Affected File(s)

Which file(s) contain the error? (e.g., `05-CLAUSE6-PLANNING/AI-RISK-REGISTER.md`)

## Expected Content

What should the file say or contain?

## Actual Content

What does it currently say?

## ISO 42001 Reference (if applicable)

Which clause or control is affected?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
